arch_audit.output:
libxml2 is affected by denial of service. High risk!
pam is affected by arbitrary filesystem access. High risk!
coreutils is affected by information disclosure. Medium risk!
cpio is affected by arbitrary command execution. Medium risk!
giflib is affected by information disclosure. Medium risk!
libheif is affected by information disclosure. Medium risk!
libtiff is affected by unknown, denial of service. Medium risk!
openjpeg2 is affected by arbitrary code execution. Medium risk!
openssl is affected by arbitrary command execution, certificate verification bypass. Medium risk!
openvpn is affected by information disclosure. Medium risk!
perl is affected by signature forgery, directory traversal, unknown. Medium risk!
systemd is affected by information disclosure. Medium risk!
wget is affected by information disclosure. Medium risk!
xdg-utils is affected by information disclosure. Medium risk!
lua51 is affected by denial of service. Low risk!

external_aur_check.output:
ERROR: Malicious npm package list not found: data/malicious_npm_packages.txt
Set MALICIOUS_NPM_LIST or run from the repo root.

links.name: CachyOS - AUR Compromised 1500+ packages
links.note: Hilo principal con seguimiento, advertencias y discusión técnica.

links.name: CachyOS - How to check compromised packages
links.note: Publicación orientada a chequeo de exposición real. Indica que las listas siguen actualizándose.

links.name: Garuda Linux - Attack wave on AUR packages
links.note: Aviso comunitario para usuarios Garuda/Arch sobre la ola de ataque.

links.name: Garuda / Chaotic-AUR reports
links.note: Hilo de reportes y recompilación de paquetes.

links.name: GitHub - lenucksi/aur-malware-check
links.note: Herramienta comunitaria y listas consolidadas para el ataque atomic-lockfile.

links.name: Arch aur-general official report thread
links.note: Hilo oficial de aur-general donde Arch pidió reportar paquetes maliciosos en un solo lugar. El programa extrae nombres desde enlaces AUR del hilo.

links.name: Arch affected packages live list
links.note: Lista oficial/viva mencionada por Arch con paquetes afectados conocidos. El programa la consulta automáticamente.

links.name: Arch Security Advisories
links.note: Fuente oficial para vulnerabilidades conocidas de paquetes oficiales de Arch. arch-audit consulta esta información.

incident_sources.recommendation: Las listas comunitarias pueden seguir actualizándose. Repite el análisis luego de actualizar el sistema o instalar paquetes AUR.
